title: PositionTrackingPurposeTypeValues
description:
Tracking positions to support long-term business or investment decisions.

Comment:
Example:
Analyzing net asset positions to inform mergers, acquisitions, or capital allocation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking used for daily transaction processing and operations.

Comment:
Example:
Checking available balance before processing a payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking focused on exposure and risk management.

Comment:
Example:
Tracking foreign exchange exposure.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking used for regulatory and policy adherence.

Comment:
Example:
Monitoring capital adequacy positions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Performance Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking used to evaluate returns and efficiency.

Comment:
Example:
Tracking portfolio returns over time.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Liquidity Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking ability to meet short-term obligations.

Comment:
Example:
Monitoring cash inflows and outflows.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Forecasting Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking positions to predict future financial states and support planning.

Comment:
Example:
Projecting cash positions for the next quarter to manage funding needs.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Audit Position Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracking positions to provide historical records for audit, accountability, and verification.

Comment:
Example:
Maintaining a log of all changes to portfolio holdings for regulatory audits.
